name: Parsleyed Scallops
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons melted butter mixed with 1 teaspoon lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the broiler.
2. Toss the scallops, bread crumbs, parsley, lemon rind, and oil in a bowl until the scallops are well coated.
3. Place the scallops on a large greased baking sheet.
4. Broil 4 inches from the heat until the scallops are golden brown, about 4 minutes. Do not turn them.
5. Transfer the scallops to serving plates.
6. Drizzle with the melted butter.
7. Place the tomatoes on the same baking sheet.
8. Sprinkle with salt, Parmesan cheese, and pepper.
9. Broil 4 inches from the heat until the tomatoes are golden and bubbly, about 3 minutes.
10. Serve with the scallops garnished with parsley sprigs.
